results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a registered user to log in with a valid email address and password.

test_cases.title: Successful login with valid email address and password
test_cases.objective: Verify that a registered user can authenticate using a valid email address and password.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Provide a valid email address and password to the login capability.
steps.expected_result: The system authenticates the credentials and grants access to the application.

test_cases.expected_result: The user is successfully logged in and gains access to the application.
assumptions: A registered user account with a valid email address and password exists in the system.

traceability.coverage_item: Successful login with valid email address and password

source_basis: allow a registered user to log in with a valid email address and password

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a registered user to log in with a valid email address and password.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Successful login with valid email address and password
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that a registered user can authenticate using valid credentials
source_basis: allow a registered user to log in with a valid email address and password

results.requirement_text: The system shall display an error message when login credentials are invalid.

test_cases.title: Display error message on invalid login credentials
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system displays an error message when login credentials are invalid.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Attempt to log in with invalid credentials.
steps.expected_result: System displays an error message indicating the credentials are invalid.

test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message indicating the credentials are invalid.
assumptions: Login interface is accessible and can accept credential input.

traceability.coverage_item: Display error message on invalid login credentials

source_basis: display an error message when login credentials are invalid

plans.requirement_text: The system shall display an error message when login credentials are invalid.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Display error message on invalid login credentials
coverage_items.rationale: Verify that the system shows the required error message when a user provides invalid login credentials
source_basis: display an error message when login credentials are invalid

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to request a password reset link for a registered email address.

test_cases.title: Request password reset link for a registered email address
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user can request a password reset link using a registered email address.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.
A registered email address exists in the system.

steps.action: Submit a password reset request using the registered email address.
steps.expected_result: The system processes the request and sends a password reset link to the email address.

test_cases.expected_result: Password reset link is sent to the registered email address.
assumptions: The email delivery mechanism is operational and can deliver the reset link to the registered email address.

traceability.coverage_item: User can request a password reset link using a registered email address

source_basis: request a password reset link for a registered email address

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to request a password reset link for a registered email address.

coverage_items.coverage_item: User can request a password reset link using a registered email address
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system provides the reset link functionality for a valid registered email address
source_basis: request a password reset link for a registered email address

results.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

test_cases.title: Prevent non‑admin user from opening user management page
test_cases.objective: Verify that users lacking administrator permission cannot open the user management page.
preconditions: A user without administrator permission is available

steps.action: Attempt to open the user management page
steps.expected_result: Access is denied and the page is not opened

test_cases.expected_result: User management page is not accessible to the user without administrator permission.
assumptions: Assume a configured user without administrator permission is used for the test.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that a user without administrator permission cannot open the user management page

source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page

plans.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Verify that a user without administrator permission cannot open the user management page
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures that unauthorized users are denied access as required
source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page

results.requirement_text: The system shall require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard.

test_cases.title: User accepts updated terms and accesses dashboard
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user can accept updated terms and then successfully access the dashboard.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.expected_result: System records acceptance of the updated terms.

test_cases.expected_result: Dashboard is displayed successfully after acceptance of updated terms.
assumptions: Assume that a mechanism for accepting terms exists and the dashboard is a protected resource.

traceability.coverage_item: User accepts updated terms and then accesses the dashboard successfully

warnings: TC_REQ_1_002: The test case invents a prompt behavior ('prompts the user to accept the updated terms') that is not specified in the requirement.

plans.requirement_text: The system shall require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard.

coverage_items.coverage_item: User accepts updated terms and then accesses the dashboard successfully
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system allows dashboard access after the required acceptance of updated terms.

coverage_items.coverage_item: User attempts to access the dashboard without accepting updated terms
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the system blocks dashboard access when the acceptance prerequisite has not been met.
source_basis: require users to accept updated terms before accessing the dashboard
